name: Shishigami
description: Shishigami is the ancient spirit of the forest. During the day, Shishigami resembles a great stag with many antlers, bird-like feet, and the face of a baboon. At sunset, Shishigami becomes Daidarabocchi , a huge god in a humanoid form that appears to be made out of stars with a long pointed face and tentacle-like spikes on the back. Shishigami is protected by the Wolf Clan. As he walks, flowers bloom up at his feet though they quickly wither and die. He is capable of both giving life and taking

name: Talia
description: The Pain Blighted, whose ability allows her to link with anyone she sees, at which point she and her target will share any injuries either suffers. Given the nature of her power, she often harms herself as a tactic in battle, earning her the name "Talia the Hundred Pains." She has a self-sacrificing personality where she will endure pain willingly for the sake of her friends. She loves gossip, and often takes care of Ren as the only other girl in the guild. description: **Height:** 154 cm A participant in the 12th Juuni Taisen burdened with the title of the ‘tiger’ from the Chinese Zodiac. This clawed girl kills her enemies by damaging them with increasing pain and intensity. If there was a survey on "which warrior you never want to meet on the battlefield," she would no doubt be one of the top answers. name: You Uei
description: __Height:__ 177 cm (5'10") You is a pre-petrification human and former policeman who is revived by [Tsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/124144/Tsukasa-Shishiou). name: Yukiko Asai
description: Yukiko is always full of energy and positive thinking, which makes her quite an odd couple with her boyfriend Tsuyoshi. She loves cosplaying and has very good interpersonal skills. She goes to a different school than all the main characters.

name: Yuuko Sagiri
description: __Height:__ 175 cm A genius surgeon with enormous breasts. Is as precise with a katana as she is with a scalpel.

name: Akatsuki Minami
description: A short, athletic high school girl, and a good friend of [Yume Irido](https://anilist.co/character/214056/Yume-Irido). She’s chirpy, great at interacting and up-to-date in fashion sense and makeup, but she has a tendency to become obsessive when she begins to care about or like someone, both in friendships and romance. She's also a close childhood friend of [Kogure Kawanami](https://anilist.co/character/214060/Kogure-Kawanami), who she seems to share a complicated past with...

name: Amarao
description: Commander Amarao works for the department of Interstellar Immigration. This agency, among other things, acts as a middle man for negotiations between the government and Medical Mechanica. Thus, Haruko/Raharu is a big problem for them as she is bent on provoking an attack by disrupting communications. Amarao has fake eyebrows made of nori which he believes serve the dual purpose of making him look macho and protecting him from N.O. Amarao seems to have had a past relationship with Haruko similar

name: Aroma Kurosu
description: Aroma is a Cool Type Idol whose brand is LOVE DEVI (previously Holic Trick Classic). Aroma is a troubling girl who acts like a devil. She is also portrayed as an evil person who will do anything to achieve her goals, including petty tricks and sabotage if it suits the situation. She is portrayed as blunt and somewhat cruel, but she also cares for Mikan very much and values her friendship, even when she doesn't act like it. This stems from the fact that they have been together since they were rea

name: Bickslow
description: __Occupation:__ Mage __Affiliation:__ Fairy Tail __Team:__ Thunder Legion __Magic:__ Seith Magic, Figure Eyes Bickslow, also spelled Bixlow, is a mage who belongs to the guild Fairy Tail. He, along with Freed Justine and Evergreen, make up the Thunder Legion. Like the other members of the Thunder Legion, he has great respect for Laxus Dreyar and has been shown to go against Fairy Tail on Laxus' command. Bickslow has a lighthearted personality and has the tendency to laugh out loud and stick out

name: Brad Burns
description: Around 14 years ago, Brad and his little brother Luke were left by their father. They eventually found themselves in New York City, in the biggest slum in the world, The Five Points. There they met Gene McDowell, the founder of the Grave Diggers, a gang, who helped them. Now Brad is working for the Grave Diggers as their hitman known as "Grim Reaper" using a gunknife, while Luke don't know about his job and is searching information for his father Edward King.

name: Bug-Eyes
description: __Height:__ 175cm Thorfinn, better known by his nickname Bug-Eyes, is a trader working with [Leif Erikson](https://anilist.co/character/19486/). A former slave, Bug-Eyes was bought by Leif under the false assumption that he was [Thorfinn](https://anilist.co/character/10138/), son of Thors.

name: Chiquitita
description: The son of the [Dover Demon](https://anilist.co/character/270705/Penny-Chinkosu), also known as the Mantisian. He needed to ingest new blood every day, but his life was saved thanks to [Seiko](https://anilist.co/character/234824/Seiko-Ayase) and crew giving them a cow. Currently lives on Earth with his father.

name: Eiko Oni
description: Eiko is a freshman student attending Babylus Demon School. She constantly tries to have a conversation with Iruma Suzuki ever since he saved her but fails every single effort throughout the series. She's somewhat sociable, as she's usually seen casually talking to multiple unnamed background characters, but mainly hanging with her close group of friends. name: Emma
description: Emma is quite an anomaly for her time; her glasses -- something a person of her station would never have afforded -- is symbolic of her character traits as well. She can read, is educated somewhat, is reserved and even naturally refined, though this is often misread as "quiet" or "shy". She is shy as well however, and speaks little of herself or indeed at all. Orphaned, she started life on her own as a flower girl -- someone who sells flowers that they could find underfoot near the flower seller

name: Gon
description: Gon's exact saurian species is never delved into. He vaguely resembles an outdated depiction of a generic carnosaur in a tripod stance. He is an omnivore with an enormous appetite. He possesses enormous power and endurance for his size, his feats of strength including supporting his own weight with his jaws, to being able to partially lift a fully grown African Elephant.
